'''Arjus''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Desev system]]. It was a huge [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] that was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by 38 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

{{Planet-stub}}
